mapper.select: select id, template_id, parent_id, chapter_code, chapter_name, chapter_level, chapter_path, node_kind, sort_order, required_flag, enabled_flag, default_expand, completeness_requirement, chapter_desc, cast(attrs_json as char) as attrs_json, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at from t1_dossier_template_chapter where template_id = #{templateId} order by sort_order asc, created_at asc
mapper.insert:
insert into t1_dossier_template_chapter (id, template_id, parent_id, chapter_code, chapter_name, chapter_level, chapter_path, node_kind, sort_order, required_flag, enabled_flag, default_expand, completeness_requirement, chapter_desc, attrs_json, created_by, updated_by) values
(#{item.id}, #{item.templateId}, #{item.parentId}, #{item.chapterCode}, #{item.chapterName}, #{item.chapterLevel}, #{item.chapterPath}, #{item.nodeKind}, #{item.sortOrder}, #{item.requiredFlag}, #{item.enabledFlag}, #{item.defaultExpand}, #{item.completenessRequirement}, #{item.chapterDesc}, #{item.attrsJson}, #{item.createdBy}, #{item.updatedBy})
mapper.delete:
delete from t1_dossier_template_chapter where template_id in
#{templateId}
